title: fraxinus insularis
intro: Fraxinus insularis, also known as the Insular Ash tree, is a rare species of ash tree native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fraxinus insularis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Fraxinus insularis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical paste to soothe skin conditions and wounds.
